title: taraxacum staticifolium
intro: Taraxacum staticifolium, also known as the upright dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals like potassium and iron, providing various health benefits such as improving digestion, reducing blood pressure, and boosting the immune system. Taraxacum staticifolium is often used in herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also consumed as a food supplement in the form of capsules or tablets.
